ItacPersonItem.Notes: He was the dedicatee of a collection of poems by some Accesi academicians, on the occasion of his wedding (28 April 1561). The collection has remained in manuscript. See Ricco` (1989).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
